name: 00-smoke
hypothesis: Smoke test: the iga-engine + tide-admin-cli pipeline provisions a Tide realm with the 'testapp' client and one Tide-linked admin user, and the test-app can bind to the realm and log that admin in.
_provides: a Tide realm with the 'testapp' client (origin http://localhost:3000) and one admin user (Tide-linked + tide-realm-admin). No roles — this is the minimal pipeline smoke test.
